# PHP Dependency Injection Benchmark

This repository benchmarks different dependency injection containers.

## Summary

| Container | Average | Minimum | Maximum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| laravel | 0.54304404258728 | 0.54020404815674 | 0.54665207862854 |
| nette-di | 0.0034966945648193 | 0.0034670829772949 | 0.0035722255706787 |
| php-di | 0.00088839530944824 | 0.00084590911865234 | 0.00095915794372559 |
| pimple | 0.070044040679932 | 0.069553136825562 | 0.070616960525513 |
| quickly-configured | 0.003811502456665 | 0.0037400722503662 | 0.0038630962371826 |
| quickly-reflection | 0.0038432121276855 | 0.0037879943847656 | 0.0039091110229492 |
| symfony | 0.002615213394165 | 0.0026018619537354 | 0.0026302337646484 |

![Speed comparison without startup time](speed_comparison_without_startup.png)

![Speed comparison with startup time](speed_comparison_with_startup.png)

## Test Results

Results from the latest automated run of the Dockerized benchmarks
(triggered on pushes to main and a monthly schedule):

### laravel
run 0: 0.54197192192078 seconds per 10000
run 1: 0.54307794570923 seconds per 10000
run 2: 0.55189299583435 seconds per 10000
run 3: 0.54354596138 seconds per 10000
run 4: 0.5467209815979 seconds per 10000

AVERAGE | MINIMUM | MAXIMUM
0.54544196128845 | 0.54197192192078 | 0.55189299583435

run 0: 0.54665207862854 seconds per 10000

0.54304404258728 | 0.54020404815674 | 0.54665207862854
